description: An Alternative/Indie song with mixed vocals, noisy snare, punchy kick, wide tinny hi hats, electric guitar melody, synth lead melody, and groovy bass guitar. Ends with a short snare roll and claps.
accompaniment: Electric guitar melody, noisy snare, punchy kick, wide tinny hi hats, groovy bass guitar
tempo_and_rhythm: Groovy bass guitar, noisy snare, punchy kick, wide tinny hi hats
production_quality: Noisy snare, wide tinny hi hats (suggests a lo-fi or raw production quality)
